hero.title: Global Network Diagnostics Platform
hero.subtitle: 100+ real probe nodes — multi-region checks, real-time monitoring, one-click diagnostics
hero.createMonitorDesc: to continuously check connectivity from multiple regions to your site

diagnose.label: One-click Diagnostics
diagnose.title: One-click Full Diagnostics
diagnose.subtitle: HTTP • Ping • DNS • SSL • Traceroute
diagnose.desc: Enter once, run multiple checks simultaneously to quickly locate network connectivity and configuration issues for a domain/IP.
diagnose.placeholder: Enter domain or IP, e.g. github.com

probe.label: Network Probe
probe.title: Network Probe Tools
probe.subtitle: Multi-node real-time probing • Network connectivity diagnostics
probe.desc: 100+ global probe nodes simulate user access to domains/IPs, helping detect network and site availability issues.

domain.label: Domain Lookup
domain.title: Domain Information Lookup
domain.subtitle: WHOIS • ICP • SSL • DNS — comprehensive query
domain.desc: Query domain registration info, ICP filing status, SSL certificate status and DNS records.

networkMonitor.title: Network Quality Monitoring
networkMonitor.desc: Actively probe network quality from users worldwide to cloud and edge nodes, including reachability, latency, packet loss and jitter.

dnsMonitor.title: DNS Monitoring
dnsMonitor.desc: Actively probe DNS availability and latency, analyze and diagnose DNS records.

apiMonitor.title: API Monitoring
apiMonitor.desc: Actively probe HTTP API response time, status codes and response correctness from users worldwide.

webMonitor.title: Web Page Monitoring
webMonitor.desc: Analyze overall page load time from the user perspective, measure CDN and origin latency and availability to gain user experience insights.

alerts.title: Alerting
alerts.desc: Support fixed-threshold and intelligent-baseline anomaly detection, notify stakeholders immediately when issues are detected.

analysis.title: Multi-dimensional Analysis
analysis.desc: Analyze network quality and user experience by region, city and carrier.

instant.title: Instant Probe
instant.desc: Launch a probe immediately, view results instantly for issue diagnosis and service verification.

openApi.title: Open API
openApi.desc: Pull probe data via API for failover, reporting and other use cases.

http.name: HTTP Check
http.desc: HTTP/HTTPS response time and status check

dns.name: DNS Query
dns.desc: Global DNS resolution and pollution detection

ssl.name: SSL Check
ssl.desc: SSL certificate chain and security config validation

traceroute.name: Traceroute
traceroute.desc: Network path tracing and hop analysis

diagnose.name: One-click Diagnostics
diagnose.desc: Comprehensive network diagnostics and issue location
